policy.battle_boundary: No battle gate opens before candidate copy and card-level usage evidence.
policy.cut_source_boundary: A seeded role still needs a fresh same-lane current-deck cut source plus trace before candidate copy.
policy.recycling_boundary: Current-deck sources already used, seen, stage-only, blocked, or traced remain unavailable.
policy.seed_boundary: Reviewed external nonpayoff cards are miner seeds only; they are not add approval or cut permission.
